provenance.environment: synthesis of the in-sample + OOS evidence above

result.finding: consistent-winner check: lipid's win-margins are in-sample 0.649, Tang 0.716, Kim 1.57 log10; the MINIMUM is 0.649 (> 0.3), so lipid wins EVERY measured dataset, not just on average. RECOMMENDATION: prefer lipid loading for shoot/grain/out-of-sample prediction; keep the free-anion as the conservative default in code (lipid opt-in) until a reliable 2-pool root removes the single-pool long-chain root tradeoff (runs/pfas-rice-longchain-complete/-decouple: not yet resolvable).
